content.en:
"It's coming!"

Ye Tian sensed the breath of some innate gods, and all of them were very powerful, all of them were at the Heavenly Venerable or Supreme level, adding up to almost dozens.

Such a force, how terrifying, under the blessing of the Desolate Realm, even the supremes of the Protoss did not dare to attack it, and in the outside world, it was enough to be called the Great Race of the Universe.

And now, Ye Tian alone needs to face so many supreme attacks, which is definitely a huge challenge.

"It's almost ten minutes before you can completely control the wasteland, and you only need to survive ten minutes!"

Ye Tian calculated.

Whoa!!!

One innate deity after another came, and the first one to come was the first innate deity of the desolate realm, and it was also the first supreme - Desolate Venerable.

Rumble!!!

The aura of the desolate venerable enveloped this area, and his gaze was fixed on Ye Tian's body.

"Tianzun realm, non-innate gods!"

Desolate Venerable was stunned at first, and was a little puzzled, how could an outside Heavenly Venerable like Ye Tian appear here, but he quickly understood.

"I understand, you are the Tianzun of the outside world, you once broke into the Desolate Tower, obtained the Desolate Lord's order, and now you have cultivated to break through to the Tianzun realm and want to control the Desolate Realm. Damn outsiders, look for death!"

Arabic was furious.

In his opinion, the wasteland belonged to their innate gods, and outsiders were not allowed to touch it.

But now, Ye Tian was actually trying to control their desolate realm, once Ye Tian really did it, wouldn't they be finished?

So, he didn't allow that to happen.

"Aragami Heavenly Hand!"

Huangzun suppressed it with one hand, and a hand that covered the sky and the sun was born from the void and slapped towards Ye Tian.

Such a blow is definitely comparable to the full force of the powerful supreme, and it is blessed with the power of the desolate world, which is enough to threaten the life of the powerful supreme.

In Desolate Venerable's opinion, Ye Tian was just Tianzun's combat power breath, and he couldn't block such a powerful blow at all.

"It's worthy of being the first supreme desolate desolate in the desolate realm, but it's a pity that you forgot that I have the desolate master's order?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the wasteland was blessed on Ye Tian's body, and it immediately merged with Ye Tian's power, plus Ye Tian instantly cast the Chaos True Technique-Chaos God Golem and Tiangang Battle Technique First Form.

Suddenly, an earth-shattering aura of gods and demons was born.

I saw that the Chaos God and Demon who stepped on the earth and the sky above his head protected Ye Tian, and his hands slapped out, and they collided with the Desolate God Heavenly Hand, producing an earth-shattering trembling sound.

Thundered!!!!

This piece of void continued to shatter, but under the strong resilience of the wasteland, it gradually calmed down.

"The Wasteland Lord's Order, I didn't expect you to mobilize so much of the power of the Wasteland!!"

Aramazun showed an incredulous look and roared angrily.

If there was no Desert Master's order, he thought that he would definitely be able to kill Ye Tian in an instant.

But with the Desolate Lord's Order, a top Heavenly Venerable like Ye Tian can exert the combat power of a top supreme, although it is still inferior to him, but it can compete with one or two.

He, time is limited, and there is no room for delay.

Once Ye Tian completely controls the Wasteland, he can even deprive them of the authority to mobilize the power of the Wasteland, in this way, they can only exert their original combat power.

These innate gods seem to be able to resist the attacks of all races, but they rely on the power of the Wasteland, even if the first god master enters the Wasteland, they can't resist their innate gods.

But once they don't have the power of the Wasteland, these innate gods are nothing, and together they can't compete with a supreme like the First Divine Lord.

Most of these supremes are ordinary supremes, and there are only a few powerful supremes, which are not powerful, and they can't compete with the realm lords who control the desolate realm.

"He must be killed as soon as possible, or I won't be able to fight him anymore!"

Arabic was in a hurry.

He had been the First Supreme of the Wasteland for a long time, and no one among the other Supremes dared to resist him at all.

It even made him think that it didn't matter if he had a desolate master order or not, but he never expected that someone would really get the desolate master's order.

Once the Realm Lord is born in the Wasteland, his position will be lost, and he will even die.

Therefore, he had to kill Ye Tian.

Boom !!

Huangzun continued to attack Ye Tian, using a powerful secret technique.

Under such a powerful attack, even if Ye Tian was able to mobilize the power of the Wasteland, he was still injured, and his injuries were getting worse and worse.

But he still persisted!

"Let's do it together, this person is an outside cultivator, once he controls the Desolate Realm, will we, the innate gods, still have room to live?"

"Yes, Arama!"

The other supreme-level innate gods also realized that the matter was serious, and they had to kill Ye Tian, otherwise their desolate realm would completely fall into the desolate realm of outsiders.

Thundered!!!

Many supremes besieged it together, and in just an instant, Ye Tian flew out, seriously injured!

"Run!"

Ye Tian began to move rapidly.

Controlling the Wasteland doesn't require immobility, and those innate gods can't interrupt his process of controlling the Wasteland now, as long as he doesn't die.

So, the most important thing for him right now is to save his life.

"If you want to escape, don't think about it!"

Arazun Road.

One innate god after another tried to intercept Ye Tian, plus they all controlled the power of the Wasteland, it was very difficult to get rid of them.

Gradually, Ye Tian's aura became very weak.

"I still underestimate these innate gods, the power of the Desolate Venerable alone is extremely terrifying, and the other supreme-level innate gods are not weak at all, fortunately I still have hole cards, otherwise I will definitely die, and I can't support the moment when I control the Desolate Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Just when his body couldn't hold on, Ye Tian finally activated one of his hole cards.

"Time back!"

In an instant, Ye Tian's state returned to when he was not injured before.

Time regression is an ability of time talent, once in the last tribulation of the Ten Tribulations area of the Ruins World, he used time rewinding, and finally broke through the Ten Tribulations area.

He hadn't used time to go back in a long time.

This time, he did it again.

The time talent on the second deity is naturally not a super-god-level time talent, but just an arcane-level time talent, which was once plundered from an enemy son of the universe.

The arcane time talent can be used to rewind time, but the effect is not good, and the time rewind cannot be long.

In addition, if you use the Tianzun realm to go back in time, the sequelae are very large.

But in order to completely control the wasteland, the sequelae are big, and he doesn't care.

Seeing that Ye Tian's state quickly recovered to his peak, Desolate Zun's pupils shrank: "Time talent, damn it, attack with all your might, otherwise we will be finished!"

The other supremes also understood, and they all cast forbidden spells and wanted to kill Ye Tian at all costs.

In this way, after a while, Ye Tian had no choice but to cast the time regression again, this was the second time to cast the time regression, on the surface, it seemed to be back to the peak state, but once the time passed, the sequelae were too great.

In the past, the sequelae were just a loss of some lifespan, but if it is performed in the Tianzun realm, the sequelae are not lifespan, and the permanent damage to the soul and physical body is difficult to recover.

Nine minutes passed.

Seeing that he could completely control the Wasteland, Ye Tian couldn't hold on again.

Then.

Ye Tian gritted his teeth and began to perform the third time backtrack.

Rumble!!!

The power of time rippled, and Ye Tian returned to his peak state again.

Seeing this scene, Huangzun's pupils shrank: "Crazy, you are in the realm of Tianzun, and your time talent is only at the arcane level, you dare to use time backtracking for the third time, if you do this, you may not be able to make progress in the future." Madman, what's the benefit of you controlling the wasteland!!!"

Ye Tian ignored Desoventur's words and continued to protect himself.

The final wave of attacks passed quickly, and the ten minutes were reached.

Rumble!!!!

The Desolate Realm was completely controlled by the Desolate Lord's Order, and the Desolate Master's Order flew to Ye Tian's body and integrated into his body.

At this time, Ye Tiandao: "From today on, I am the Lord of the Wasteland!"
